subject: NY weather alert!
body:
Teterboro weather:
Rain and fog all day today.
400 overcast and 1 mile visibility (chance for 1/2 mile visibility)  
high temp 54 degrees. after 6pm wind 20 gusting  30mph.
clearing Tuesday morning to Partly cloudy.
LV
